enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

Neeye Unakku Raja expresses deep emotions of love and devotion, highlighting the beauty of companionship.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

The song plays during a pivotal moment in Thoongavanam, emphasizing the protagonist's feelings towards their beloved.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung by Kamal Haasan and composed by M. Ghibran.

When was the song released?

Neeye Unakku Raja was released on October 14, 2015.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Neeye Unakku Raja, Kamal Haasan's voice weaves a tale of love and longing, perfectly encapsulating the emotional depth of the film Thoongavanam. The song's soothing melody creates an atmosphere of tranquility, inviting listeners to reflect on their own romantic experiences. As the protagonist navigates through their feelings, the lyrics evoke a sense of nostalgia and warmth. This track stands out as a heartfelt expression of devotion, making it a memorable piece in Tamil cinema.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Neeye Unakku Raja from Thoongavanam is a mesmerizing melody that showcases Kamal Haasan's soulful voice. The song beautifully captures the essence of love and longing, making it a perfect addition to any romantic playlist. With M. Ghibran's enchanting composition, this track is sure to resonate with listeners seeking a soothing experience.
stanzaMeanings: You are the king for you, your head is your crown. Rise and shine, travel through the paths.
Beauty will last until the day comes when both eyes sleep.
Will the sea sleep in the storm? Just like that, he is in a deep sleep.
Whichever direction you choose, it is all within you, my friend.
In whichever direction, you have no limits, everything is your victory, my friend.
You are the king for you, your head is your crown. Rise and shine, travel through the paths.
The work done will not allow the light to be killed.
You, like a lamp, cannot be extinguished by change.
Failure is the knowledge that leads to success, the sea will always have its shore.
What is the heart? It is your essence.
Your heart that beats is in a deep sleep.
You are the king for you, your head is your crown. Rise and shine, travel through the paths.
Beauty will last until the day comes when both eyes sleep.
Will the sea sleep in the storm? Just like that, he is in a deep sleep.
Whichever direction you choose, it is all within you, my friend.
In whichever direction, you have no limits, everything is your victory, my friend.
You are the king for you, your head is your crown. Rise and shine, travel through the paths.
